OUTERSTEPPES-CENTENNIAL_FOUNTAIN.title: Centennial Fountain
OUTERSTEPPES-CENTENNIAL_FOUNTAIN.pages.I:
You happen upon a fountain full of all sorts of coins. 
Inscribed on it are the words “What you take, you shall return a hundredfold”.
OUTERSTEPPES-CENTENNIAL_FOUNTAIN.pages.C:
You search the whole fountain for a while, trying to find the perfect coin. 
Hidden under some coins you manage to find a coin that is cool and you want it. 

You toss away [blue]{GoldCost}[/blue] of your bits of [gold]Gold[/gold] to pay for your new shiny and continue your journey...
OUTERSTEPPES-CENTENNIAL_FOUNTAIN.pages.P:
You just start grabbing coins out of the Fountain and start stuffing them into your pocket. 
As you do, you feel your conscience weighing on you [sine]heavily[/sine]. 

Eventually, the [red]Guilt[/red] gets to you and you leave the fountain. 
Was it guilt? Or was it Compulsion?
